Fixture 9: Degraded Provider (Codex/Gemini)
- Scenario: PROVIDER_DEGRADED=true, simplified prompt format
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "./prd.md", 2) with PROVIDER_DEGRADED=true
- Expected Behavior: Uses simplified degraded-provider path (line 9304+)
- Key Variables:
  - PROVIDER_DEGRADED: "true"
  - Output format: Simpler wording, no cache markers
  - No loki_system/dynamic_context tags
- Test: Verify output uses printf simple format without XML tags
